title: Create: Minerals Industry
description: Automate the production of netherite and diamonds with create! A revamped version of Create: Netherite Automation
body:
Create: Minerals Insustry is a create addon that is a revamped version of another create addon [Create: Netherite Automation](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-netherite-automation). Which is made by the same person who made this addon.

# Description:

This mod makes netherite and diamonds automated with create while keeping the right balance unlike Create  Netherite Automation. More ores _like emeralds, redstone etc_ will be added in later updates.

 

##  Requirements:
 • [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

##  Optional Mods (Suggested):

 • [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)

##  Not Compataible:

 • [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)

 

 ## What to expect in later updates:
 • Balanced Automation of more minerals.
 
 • Revamp of the textures.
 
 • More food, recipe, waste items.
 
 • More create based blocks.
